name: medical-mechanical-design-assistant
description: A constrained, traceable front-end design workstation for medical mechanical project intake, source collection, concept planning, fixture modifications, risk reviews, verification planning, and layout-ready inputs.

interface.shortDescription: Structured early-stage medical mechanical design workflow.
interface.longDescription: Helps mechanical engineers guide users through project intake, accepted file formats, equipment/source collection, CAD/video/audio readiness, design briefs, concept options, preliminary risk reviews, and verification plans for medical-related embodied intelligence and non-standard fixture modification work. AI generates and challenges drafts; scripts check completeness and file readiness; engineers remain responsible for judgment, approval, and validation.
defaultPrompt: 引导我准备一个医疗机械自动化项目的输入资料包。
整理这个项目的设计输入、缺失资料和来源记录。
生成方案选项、外部辅助机构清单和初步风险评审。
